rules.summary: Use pnpm 10 for monorepo package and script commands.
rules.trigger_intent: run package-management or monorepo script commands

rules.summary: Use Node.js 22 or newer for repository commands.
Install dependencies with pnpm install.
Start the Studio development server with pnpm dev:studio.
rules.evidence: pnpm dev:studio                       # run Studio dev server

rules.summary: Run Studio unit tests with pnpm test:studio.
rules.evidence: pnpm test:studio                      # run Studio unit tests (vitest)

rules.summary: Run Studio end-to-end tests through the e2e/studio prefix.
rules.evidence: pnpm --prefix e2e/studio run e2e       # run Studio E2E tests (playwright)

rules.summary: Build Studio with the studio filter.
Lint Studio with the studio filter.
Type-check all packages with pnpm typecheck.
Import shared UI components from the ui package.
rules.trigger_intent: add or change an import of a shared UI component

rules.summary: Use _Shadcn_-suffixed variants for form primitives.
rules.trigger_intent: add or change usage of a form primitive
rules.evidence: use `_Shadcn_` suffixed variants for form primitives.

rules.summary: Check packages/ui/index.tsx before creating a UI primitive.
Use only Tailwind for styling.
Use semantic design tokens in Tailwind styles.
rules.trigger_intent: add or change Tailwind color styling

rules.summary: Do not use hardcoded colors.
rules.trigger_intent: add or change a color value in styling

rules.summary: Write user-facing and repository language in U.S. English.
rules.trigger_intent: edit English-language text in the repository

rules.summary: Use the shared Studio shortcut registry and primitives for repeated UI actions.
rules.trigger_intent: add or change a repeated Studio UI action
rules.evidence: use the shared shortcut registry and primitives in `apps/studio/state/shortcuts/` and `apps/studio/components/ui/Shortcut*.tsx`.

rules.summary: Prefer registered, discoverable shortcuts to one-off keyboard listeners.
rules.trigger_intent: add or change keyboard shortcut handling in Studio
rules.evidence: Prefer registered, discoverable shortcuts over one-off keyboard listeners

rules.summary: Reserve G-then-key shortcut chords for navigation.
rules.trigger_intent: add or change a G-then-key Studio shortcut chord

rules.summary: Co-locate Studio sub-components with their parent.
Avoid creating barrel re-export files.
Consult the studio-* skills for detailed Studio conventions.
rules.trigger_intent: begin implementation work in Studio that needs detailed conventions
rules.evidence: See studio-* skills for detailed studio conventions.
